repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

origination.label: Creator
origination.persname: Phillips, Denise. (Title of work: Book of Jewish cooking..)

origination.label: Creator
origination.persname: Chamorro, Koldo. (Title of work: Jewish roots in Spain..)

did.physdesc: Correspondence, newspapers, publications, printed materials, memorabilia.
did.abstract: Correspondence, clippings, brochures, broadsides, and other records relating to the founding of the Center for Jewish Living and events associated with the Center.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Norman A. Turkish, Collector. Center for Jewish Living Records, #37-3-3431. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, clippings, brochures, broadsides, and other records relating to the founding of the Center for Jewish Living and events associated with the Center. Included are books and items relating to art exhibits; broadsides relating to events; poster and cookbook by Denise Phillips; items relating to Masters in Excellence events in 1998 and 2005 including tape recordings, posters, publicity materials, invitations, and souvenirs; items relating to a "Cantorial Weekend," 2011 including a CD of photographs by Cheryl D. Sinkow. Alphabetic subject files of material relating to individuals who had involvement with the Center or participated in events.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Materials for the inaugural "Harold I. Saperstein '31 Cornell Student Topical Sermon Contest" in 2011, honoring Rabbi Harold Saperstein, include publicity materials, invitation, program, and menu. Also, remarks from the judges (Todd Olson, Howard Erlich, and Rhoda Possen) by Todd Olson, talk on Harold I. Saperstein by Elaine D. Engst, DVD of sermon by John Ertl, and CD of photographs by Cheryl D. Sinkow. Posters and other items for the 2012 Saperstein contest, honoring Milton Konvitz, including the winning sermon by Sarah Grace Victor. Programs, menu, and souvenir booklet for the 2013 contest, honoring Sol Linowitz; also includes framed copy of photographs taken at the signing of the Panama Canal Treaties on Sept. 7, 1977 from the collection of the Organization of American States. Invitation, programs, and menu from the 2014 Saperstein contest, honoring Raymond Reisler '27, a DVD of the Gala Dinner, and sermon videos from the contest. Invitation, programs, and menus from the 2015 Saperstein contest, honoring Meyer Bender '29.

controlaccess.subject: Jewish college students -- New York (State) -- Ithaca.
controlaccess.corpname: Cornell University. Center for Jewish Living

did.unittitle: Masters in Excellence material including floppy disk and articles
Articles regarding Rabbi Saperstein as Ambassador for International Religious Freedom
Jewish Cooking, signed by Denies Phillips

Frank Robinson Dinner and Cantorial Weekend; Saperstein Sermon Contest

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: -includes two CDs of photographs by Cheryl D. Sinkow (CD-1048-1049) and one DVD of the sermon (DVD-709)

did.unittitle: First Jewish Outreach/Greek Night Dinner - song book
Items from Center for Jewish Living scrapbook

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes postcard from Norman Turkish depicting center for Jewish Living.
